core.label: Standard ML
core.description: Pioneered type inference, pattern matching, and modules.

topics.label: SML/NJ Setup
topics.description: Install Standard ML of New Jersey. ML introduced type inference and algebraic data types.

topics.label: Values & Types
topics.description: int, real, string, bool, char, unit. ML's type system infers types automatically.

topics.label: Functions & Pattern Matching
topics.description: fun keyword with pattern matching on arguments. Every function takes exactly one argument (via tuples/currying).

topics.label: Datatypes
topics.description: datatype for algebraic data types (sum types). option for nullable values.

topics.label: Lists & HOFs
topics.description: ::, hd, tl, map, filter, foldl, foldr. Lists are the primary data structure.

topics.label: Modules (Structures & Signatures)
topics.description: structure for modules, signature for interfaces, functor for parameterized modules. ML's module system is legendary.

topics.label: References & Imperative Features
topics.description: ref for mutable cells, := for assignment, ! for dereferencing. ML is mostly functional but has imperative escape hatches.

topics.label: Exception Handling
topics.description: exception and raise/handle. ML exceptions are lightweight.
